name: Matrix Rain
description: Classic matrix rain effect with falling character columns. Supports katakana, latin, binary, or custom charsets with configurable speed, density, and color.
accessibility_notes: rapid character changes may affect photosensitive users

charset.description: Character set for rain columns, or a custom string of characters

density.description: Column density — higher means more active columns

color.description: RGB color array for trail characters

className.description: CSS class for the canvas element

conflicts: semi-transparent fade causes ghosting — canvas never fully clears
many columns with high density may impact performance on large screens
